commits.subject: Day 139 (09:58): Deduplicate retroactive FailureObserved events across multiple script invocations (Task 1)

eval.reason: The new test test_skips_retroactive_failure_observed_on_second_invocation passes and correctly verifies that a second invocation of append_terminal_events does not emit duplicate FailureObserved events. No code fix was needed since find_missing_failure_observed already checks for ANY FailureObserved per run_id (including retroactive ones). All 23 tests pass.

task_file_title: Deduplicate retroactive FailureObserved events across multiple script invocations
